prepared.module target=riscv64-linux-gnu route=semantic_bir_shared
completed_phases: legalize stack_layout liveness out_of_ssa regalloc
invariants:
  - no_target_facing_i1
  - no_phi_nodes
notes:
  - [prealloc] prealloc owns the shared semantic-BIR to prealloc-BIR route before MIR lowering
  - [legalize] bootstrap BIR legalize kept semantic CFG and phi form intact while promoting i1 values plus function signature/storage bookkeeping, memory-address/load-store bookkeeping, and call ABI metadata
  - [stack_layout] stack layout prepared function 'check' with 1 home slot(s) and 4 bytes of frame space
  - [stack_layout] stack layout prepared function 'main' with 0 home slot(s) and 0 bytes of frame space
  - [stack_layout] stack layout now emits provisional stack objects, elides dead and copy-coalesced home slots, and only allocates frame storage for objects that still require dedicated homes
  - [liveness] liveness now computes BIR named-value intervals, exact def/use program points, predecessor-edge phi uses, call points, CFG-aware live-through extension, and loop depth independently of stack-layout object identity
  - [out_of_ssa] out_of_ssa removed phi nodes from live prepared BIR and published authoritative join-transfer plus parallel-copy obligations
  - [regalloc] regalloc seeded function 'check' with 15 allocation constraint(s) and 44 interference edge(s) from active liveness; assigned 10 register(s) and 5 stack slot(s)
  - [regalloc] regalloc seeded function 'main' with 626 allocation constraint(s) and 0 interference edge(s) from active liveness; assigned 223 register(s) and 403 stack slot(s)
--- prepared-bir ---

bir.func @check(ptr %p.s, i32 %p.arg1, i32 %p.shift) -> void {
entry:
  %t0 = bir.ne i32 %p.arg1, %p.shift
  bir.store_local %lv.failed, i32 %t0
  %t2 = bir.load_global i32 @debug
  %t3 = bir.ne i32 %t2, 0
  bir.cond_br i32 %t3, logic.skip.5, logic.rhs.4
logic.rhs.4:
  %t8 = bir.load_local i32 %lv.failed
  bir.br logic.rhs.end.6
logic.rhs.end.6:
  bir.br logic.end.7
logic.skip.5:
  bir.br logic.end.7
logic.end.7:
  %t9 = bir.ne i32 %t8, 0
  %t11 = bir.select ne i32 %t2, 0, i32 1, %t9
  %t12 = bir.ne i32 %t11, 0
  bir.cond_br i32 %t12, block_1, block_2
block_1:
  %t14 = bir.call i32 printf(ptr @.str0, ptr %p.s, i32 %p.arg1, i32 %p.shift)
  ; call_arg_source index=0 encoding=computed_address source_value=%t13 source_base=@.str0 source_delta=0
  ; call_arg_source index=1 encoding=computed_address source_value=%p.s source_base=%p.s source_delta=0
  ; call_arg_source index=2 encoding=register source_value_id=1 source_value=%p.arg1
  ; call_arg_source index=3 encoding=register source_value_id=2 source_value=%p.shift
  bir.br block_2
block_2:
  %t15 = bir.load_local i32 %lv.failed
  %t16 = bir.load_global i32 @nfailed
  %t17 = bir.add i32 %t16, %t15
  bir.store_global @nfailed, i32 %t17
  bir.ret
}

--- prepared-control-flow ---
prepared.func @check
  block entry terminator=cond_branch true=logic.skip.5 false=logic.rhs.4
  block logic.rhs.4 terminator=branch target=logic.rhs.end.6
  block logic.rhs.end.6 terminator=branch target=logic.end.7
  block logic.skip.5 terminator=branch target=logic.end.7
  block logic.end.7 terminator=cond_branch true=block_1 false=block_2
  block block_1 terminator=branch target=block_2
  block block_2 terminator=return
  branch_condition entry kind=fused_compare condition=%t3 compare=ne i32 %t2, 0 can_fuse_with_branch=yes true=logic.skip.5 false=logic.rhs.4
  branch_condition logic.end.7 kind=fused_compare condition=%t12 compare=ne i32 %t11, 0 can_fuse_with_branch=yes true=block_1 false=block_2

    incoming [logic.rhs.end.6] -> %t9
    incoming [logic.skip.5] -> 1
    edge_transfer logic.rhs.end.6 -> logic.end.7 incoming=%t9 destination=%t11
    edge_transfer logic.skip.5 -> logic.end.7 incoming=1 destination=%t11
  parallel_copy logic.skip.5 -> logic.end.7 execution_site=predecessor_terminator execution_block=logic.skip.5 has_cycle=no resolution=acyclic moves=1 steps=1
    authority execution_site=predecessor_terminator execution_block=logic.skip.5

    step[0] move move_index=0 source=1 destination=%t11 carrier=select_materialization uses_cycle_temp_source=no
  parallel_copy logic.rhs.end.6 -> logic.end.7 execution_site=predecessor_terminator execution_block=logic.rhs.end.6 has_cycle=no resolution=acyclic moves=1 steps=1

prepared.func @check
  home %p.s value_id=0 kind=register reg=a0
  home %p.arg1 value_id=1 kind=register reg=a1
  home %p.shift value_id=2 kind=register reg=a2
  home %t0 value_id=3 kind=register reg=t0
  home %t2 value_id=4 kind=register reg=t0
  home %t3 value_id=5 kind=stack_slot slot_id=3 offset=24
  home %t8 value_id=6 kind=stack_slot slot_id=4 offset=28
  home %t9 value_id=7 kind=register reg=t0
  home %t11 value_id=8 kind=register reg=t0
  home %t12 value_id=9 kind=stack_slot slot_id=5 offset=32
  home %t14 value_id=10 kind=register reg=t0
  home @.str0 value_id=11 kind=stack_slot slot_id=2 offset=16
  home %t15 value_id=12 kind=register reg=t0
  home %t16 value_id=13 kind=register reg=s1
  home %t17 value_id=14 kind=register reg=s2
  move_bundle phase=block_entry authority=out_of_ssa_parallel_copy block_index=3 instruction_index=0 source_parallel_copy=logic.skip.5 -> logic.end.7
    move from_value_id=8 to_value_id=8 destination_kind=value destination_storage=register op_kind=move uses_cycle_temp_source=no parallel_copy_step_index=0 source_imm_i32=1 reason=phi_join_immediate_materialization
  move_bundle phase=block_entry authority=out_of_ssa_parallel_copy block_index=2 instruction_index=0 source_parallel_copy=logic.rhs.end.6 -> logic.end.7
    move from_value_id=7 to_value_id=8 destination_kind=value destination_storage=register op_kind=move uses_cycle_temp_source=no parallel_copy_step_index=0 reason=phi_join_register_to_register
  move_bundle phase=before_instruction authority=none block_index=0 instruction_index=0
    move from_value_id=1 to_value_id=3 destination_kind=value destination_storage=register op_kind=move uses_cycle_temp_source=no reason=consumer_register_to_register
    move from_value_id=2 to_value_id=3 destination_kind=value destination_storage=register op_kind=move uses_cycle_temp_source=no reason=consumer_register_to_register
  move_bundle phase=before_instruction authority=none block_index=0 instruction_index=3
    move from_value_id=4 to_value_id=5 destination_kind=value destination_storage=stack_slot op_kind=move uses_cycle_temp_source=no reason=consumer_register_to_stack
  move_bundle phase=before_instruction authority=none block_index=4 instruction_index=0
    move from_value_id=6 to_value_id=7 destination_kind=value destination_storage=register op_kind=move uses_cycle_temp_source=no reason=consumer_stack_to_register
  move_bundle phase=before_instruction authority=none block_index=4 instruction_index=2
    move from_value_id=8 to_value_id=9 destination_kind=value destination_storage=stack_slot op_kind=move uses_cycle_temp_source=no reason=consumer_register_to_stack
  move_bundle phase=before_instruction authority=none block_index=6 instruction_index=2
    move from_value_id=13 to_value_id=14 destination_kind=value destination_storage=register op_kind=move uses_cycle_temp_source=no reason=consumer_register_to_register
    move from_value_id=12 to_value_id=14 destination_kind=value destination_storage=register op_kind=move uses_cycle_temp_source=no reason=consumer_register_to_register
  move_bundle phase=before_call authority=none block_index=5 instruction_index=0
    move from_value_id=11 to_value_id=11 destination_kind=call_argument_abi destination_storage=register op_kind=move uses_cycle_temp_source=no abi_index=0 placement=gpr:call_argument#0/w1 reg=a0 reason=call_arg_stack_to_register
    move from_value_id=0 to_value_id=0 destination_kind=call_argument_abi destination_storage=register op_kind=move uses_cycle_temp_source=no abi_index=1 placement=gpr:call_argument#1/w1 reg=a1 reason=call_arg_stack_to_register
    move from_value_id=1 to_value_id=1 destination_kind=call_argument_abi destination_storage=register op_kind=move uses_cycle_temp_source=no abi_index=2 placement=gpr:call_argument#2/w1 reg=a2 reason=call_arg_register_to_register
    move from_value_id=2 to_value_id=2 destination_kind=call_argument_abi destination_storage=register op_kind=move uses_cycle_temp_source=no abi_index=3 placement=gpr:call_argument#3/w1 reg=a3 reason=call_arg_register_to_register
    abi_binding destination_kind=call_argument_abi destination_storage=register abi_index=0 placement=gpr:call_argument#0/w1 reg=a0
    abi_binding destination_kind=call_argument_abi destination_storage=register abi_index=1 placement=gpr:call_argument#1/w1 reg=a1
    abi_binding destination_kind=call_argument_abi destination_storage=register abi_index=2 placement=gpr:call_argument#2/w1 reg=a2
    abi_binding destination_kind=call_argument_abi destination_storage=register abi_index=3 placement=gpr:call_argument#3/w1 reg=a3

    abi_binding destination_kind=call_result_abi destination_storage=register placement=gpr:call_result#0/w1 reg=a0

--- prepared-call-plans ---
prepared.func @check
  call block_index=5 inst_index=0 wrapper_kind=direct_extern_variadic variadic_fpr_arg_register_count=0 indirect=no callee=printf
    arg index=0 value_bank=gpr source_encoding=symbol_address source_value_id=11 source_symbol=@.str0 source_slot=#2 source_stack_offset=16 source_bank=gpr dest_placement=gpr:call_argument#0/w1 dest_reg=a0 dest_bank=gpr
    arg index=1 value_bank=gpr source_encoding=register source_value_id=0 source_reg=a0 source_bank=gpr dest_placement=gpr:call_argument#1/w1 dest_reg=a1 dest_bank=gpr
    arg index=2 value_bank=gpr source_encoding=register source_value_id=1 source_reg=a1 source_bank=gpr dest_placement=gpr:call_argument#2/w1 dest_reg=a2 dest_bank=gpr
    arg index=3 value_bank=gpr source_encoding=register source_value_id=2 source_reg=a2 source_bank=gpr dest_placement=gpr:call_argument#3/w1 dest_reg=a3 dest_bank=gpr
    result value_bank=gpr source_storage=register destination_storage=register destination_value_id=10 source_placement=gpr:call_result#0/w1 source_reg=a0 source_bank=gpr dest_placement=gpr:caller_saved#0/w1 dest_reg=t0 dest_bank=gpr late_publication=yes late_source_register=yes late_source_in_destination_alias=yes late_fpr_vreg_store_value_retarget=no late_current_block_publication=no
    preserve value=%p.s value_id=0 route=stack_slot spill_slot=slot#1+stack8 bank=none slot=#1 stack_offset=8 stack_size=8 stack_align=8
    preserve value=%p.arg1 value_id=1 route=callee_saved_register save_index=0 placement=gpr:callee_saved#0/w1 reg=s1 bank=gpr
    preserve value=%p.shift value_id=2 route=callee_saved_register save_index=1 placement=gpr:callee_saved#1/w1 reg=s2 bank=gpr
    preserve value=@.str0 value_id=11 route=stack_slot spill_slot=slot#2+stack16 bank=none slot=#2 stack_offset=16 stack_size=8 stack_align=8
    clobber bank=gpr placement=gpr:reserved_scratch#0/w1 reg=t0 width=1 units=t0
    clobber bank=fpr placement=fpr:reserved_scratch#0/w1 reg=ft0 width=1 units=ft0
    clobber bank=vreg placement=vreg:reserved_scratch#0/w1 reg=v0 width=1 units=v0
    clobber bank=vreg placement=vreg:reserved_scratch#1/w1 reg=v1 width=1 units=v1
    clobber bank=vreg placement=vreg:reserved_scratch#2/w1 reg=v2 width=1 units=v2
    clobber bank=vreg placement=vreg:reserved_scratch#3/w1 reg=v3 width=1 units=v3
    clobber bank=vreg placement=vreg:reserved_scratch#4/w1 reg=v4 width=1 units=v4
    clobber bank=vreg placement=vreg:reserved_scratch#5/w1 reg=v5 width=1 units=v5
    clobber bank=vreg placement=vreg:reserved_scratch#6/w1 reg=v6 width=1 units=v6
    clobber bank=vreg placement=vreg:reserved_scratch#7/w1 reg=v7 width=1 units=v7
    clobber bank=vreg placement=vreg:reserved_scratch#8/w1 reg=v8 width=1 units=v8
    clobber bank=vreg placement=vreg:reserved_scratch#9/w1 reg=v9 width=1 units=v9
    clobber bank=vreg placement=vreg:reserved_scratch#10/w1 reg=v10 width=1 units=v10
    clobber bank=vreg placement=vreg:reserved_scratch#11/w1 reg=v11 width=1 units=v11
    clobber bank=vreg placement=vreg:reserved_scratch#12/w1 reg=v12 width=1 units=v12
    clobber bank=vreg placement=vreg:reserved_scratch#13/w1 reg=v13 width=1 units=v13
    clobber bank=vreg placement=vreg:reserved_scratch#14/w1 reg=v14 width=1 units=v14
    clobber bank=vreg placement=vreg:reserved_scratch#15/w1 reg=v15 width=1 units=v15
prepared.func @main
  call block_index=13 inst_index=4 wrapper_kind=same_module variadic_fpr_arg_register_count=0 indirect=no callee=check
    arg index=0 value_bank=gpr source_encoding=symbol_address source_value_id=25 source_symbol=@.str1 source_slot=#12 source_stack_offset=48 source_bank=gpr dest_placement=gpr:call_argument#0/w1 dest_reg=a0 dest_bank=gpr
    arg index=1 value_bank=gpr source_encoding=immediate source_value_id=22 source_literal=-4 source_bank=gpr dest_placement=gpr:call_argument#1/w1 dest_reg=a1 dest_bank=gpr
    arg index=2 value_bank=gpr source_encoding=immediate source_value_id=24 source_literal=-4 source_bank=gpr dest_placement=gpr:call_argument#2/w1 dest_reg=a2 dest_bank=gpr
    preserve value=@.str1 value_id=25 route=stack_slot spill_slot=slot#12+stack48 bank=none slot=#12 stack_offset=48 stack_size=8 stack_align=8
    preserve value=@.str2 value_id=63 route=stack_slot spill_slot=slot#13+stack56 bank=none slot=#13 stack_offset=56 stack_size=8 stack_align=8
    preserve value=@.str3 value_id=102 route=stack_slot spill_slot=slot#14+stack64 bank=none slot=#14 stack_offset=64 stack_size=8 stack_align=8
    preserve value=@.str4 value_id=140 route=stack_slot spill_slot=slot#15+stack72 bank=none slot=#15 stack_offset=72 stack_size=8 stack_align=8
    preserve value=@.str5 value_id=179 route=stack_slot spill_slot=slot#16+stack80 bank=none slot=#16 stack_offset=80 stack_size=8 stack_align=8
    preserve value=@.str6 value_id=217 route=stack_slot spill_slot=slot#17+stack88 bank=none slot=#17 stack_offset=88 stack_size=8 stack_align=8
    preserve value=@.str7 value_id=256 route=stack_slot spill_slot=slot#18+stack96 bank=none slot=#18 stack_offset=96 stack_size=8 stack_align=8
